sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: One paragraph: maintain a live register of all regulatory, statutory and standards requirements applicable to the company's devices and markets, with assigned owners and review cadence.

sections.title: 2. Regulatory Register
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Populate the register for the target markets and device type above. Include as applicable: ISO 13485:2016, ISO 14971:2019, IEC 62366-1:2015, IEC 62304:2006+A1:2015 (if software), EU MDR 2017/745, MDCG guidance documents relevant to classification, EU IVDR 2017/746 (if IVD), UK MDR 2002 (as amended) and MHRA guidance, US 21 CFR Part 820, 21 CFR Part 803 (MDR), 21 CFR Part 806, 21 CFR Part 11 (if e-records), FDA premarket cybersecurity guidance (2023), MDSAP. Assign realistic owners and a quarterly or semi-annual review cadence.

sections.title: 3. Maintenance Process
sections.section_prompt: Describe how RA Lead monitors changes (subscriptions to MHRA, FDA, EUR-Lex, ISO updates), how new/changed requirements are assessed for impact, fed into Management Review per {ref:QP-005}, and trigger CAPA via {ref:CA-001} where required.
